prediction.reasoning: Based on JPM's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.6-1.9% daily), the 6-day prediction accounts for typical banking sector price movements. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard statistical methods assuming normal distribution of returns, with wider intervals reflecting the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements.
